page.content: Notably, the data reflects a projected increase in overall content spending, anticipated to reach $400M by 2026, underscoring the industry's commitment to diversifying content offerings. Additionally, the Live Event Attendance and Revenue column indicates a robust engagement strategy, with revenues expected to surpass $200M in 2023, driven by a resurgence in live performances post-pandemic.
